title: Neon Push 2
description: Neon Push is a fast-paced vertical launcher where you tap to shoot a glowing ball upward through an endless gauntlet of deadly obstacles. Time your launches carefully as a sweeping arrow guides your aim — precision and rhythm are everything. Navigate through rotating bars, flickering laser grids, armed mine fields, pulsing rings, speed zones, and turrets that fire projectiles in your path. Collect lightning pickups for a supercharged boost that launches you farther, and rack up points for every obstacle you clear and every meter you climb. How high can you push before the neon gauntlet takes you down? The theme color of this game is white blue and purple
